products.name: VINS
products.descriptor: Vision-aided INS for GNSS-denied fixed-wing, VTOL and multirotor UAVs

products.name: RESEPI
products.descriptor: LiDAR remote sensing payload instrument for aerial and mobile mapping

evidence.snippet:
LiDAR Remote Sensing Payload Instrument (RESEPI)
------------------------------------------------
![LiDAR](https://inertiallabs.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/LiDAR-RESEPI-M2X.jpg)
The Inertial Labs LiDAR Remote Sensing Payload, RESEPI, is a complete remote sensing solution. The RESEPI was designed for private labeling, so Inertial Labs’ partners can put their branding on both the hardware and software components of the RESEPI.

NDAA Compliant Drone Payloads | RESEPI and EchoONE by Inertial Labs                                                                                             [Skip to content](#content "Skip to content")

products.notes: NDAA compliance confirmed for RESEPI OUSTER OS1-64 REV7 and RESEPI GEN-II variants per resource-0032.

products.name: M-AJ-QUATRO
products.descriptor: CRPA anti-jamming antenna system for GNSS-contested environments

evidence.snippet:
##### M-AJ-QUATRO CRPA Anti-Jamming Antenna
The M-AJ-QUATRO Anti-Jamming Advanced Antenna System, designed and engineered for Assured Positioning, Navigation, and Timing across diverse and GNSS jammed, spoofed and denied environments.
MODEL

products.name: ADC
products.descriptor: Standalone IP67 air data computer for VTOL and fixed-wing UAV navigation

evidence.snippet:
[Air Data Computer](/products/apnt-assured-positioning-navigation-timing/air-data-computer/)
[DTC BluSDR-30](/products/apnt-assured-positioning-navigation-timing/wideband-ip-radio-modem-blusdr-30/)
[DWS FT743-SM](/products/apnt-assured-positioning-navigation-timing/digital-wind-sensor-ft743-sm/)
[Speed Wedge MKII](/products/apnt-assured-positioning-navigation-timing/speed-wedge-mkii/)
Controlled Radiation Pattern Antenna (CRPA) technology alongside state-of-the-art signal processing capabilities, delivering enhanced jamming mitigation for critical applications.
Standalone air data computer compatible with all Inertial Labs INS devices capable of outputting pressure altitude, air speed, air density, and outside air temperature
